LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CRITICAL IDEAS, INC., JOHN CRONIN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO THE COMPLAINT'S EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION (BANE ACT) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CRITICAL IDEAS, INC., JOHN CRONIN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OFF CALENDAR. CCP 430.41(A) REQUIRES THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER "IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE." THE EVIDENCE INDICATES THAT SUCH A MEET AND CONFER DID NOT HAPPEN. (ODISHO DECL., PAR. 7.) THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH THE CODE. DEFENDANTS' RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY MAY 26, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar May-23-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-23-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. HANNIBAL ODISHO, Esq. of Saber Law Group (Tel: 415-278-1400) for Defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CRITICAL IDEAS, INC., JOHN CRONIN's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Matter discussed. The Court conducts the hearing in camera. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record.

Counsel Odisho is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Continued To Sep-27-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS CRITICAL IDEAS, INC., JOHN CRONIN DEMURRER to COMPLAINT

Defendants' demurrer to the complaint's eighth cause of action (Bane Act) is sustained with leave to amend. A Bane Act claim requires violence or a threat of it (CACI 3066), which is not pled here. (See, e.g., Opp. 8:26-27.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS CRITICAL IDEAS, INC., JOHN CRONIN'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Off calendar. CCP 430.41(a) requires the parties to meet and confer "in person or by telephone." The evidence indicates that such a meet and confer did not happen. (Odisho Decl., par. 7.) The parties are ordered to comply with the code. Defendants' response to the complaint is now due by May 26, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
